hero_subtitle: SFTY integrates AI-assisted compliance review into established workflows, enhancing auditability, evidence integrity, and operational control for regulated digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit readiness falters without clear evidence control
problem_description: Compliance workflows struggle when AI-assisted reviews are introduced without established operational and evidence controls. This creates challenges for institutional teams seeking consistent audit trails, structured case histories and defensible compliance decisions across phased implementation stages.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects AI-assisted reviews with audit logs, decision histories and evidence packages to create a phased compliance operating layer that supports defensible workflows and consistent institutional audit readiness.
workflow_title: From case creation to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY supports a structured process that moves case initiation through AI-assisted review, decision logging and evidence preservation for defensible audit trails.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY adds a structured layer above existing workflows to preserve evidence, record decisions and support audit-ready AI-assisted compliance review for institutional VASPs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated VASPs integrating AI-assisted review with audit-ready evidence, bank due diligence and controlled deployment across secure, governed compliance workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how AI-assisted review integrates into existing workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence is preserved during AI review phases

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams with a connected operating layer that structures KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, case management, rule updates and reporting across jurisdictions and providers.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support AI-assisted review rollout?
faq_2_answer: SFTY integrates AI-assisted review as a support layer to help compliance teams prioritize cases, detect missing data, recommend next actions and draft reports subject to human approval.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence packages in audit-ready workflows that support traceability, review readiness and regulatory or bank due diligence requirements.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into structured workflows without disrupting the current compliance stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above compliance providers, connecting their outputs into one operational system rather than replacing them.
final_title: Integrate AI-assisted review into compliance workflows
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports role-based access, evidence integrity and audit-ready case management for regulated VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
